meanings.usage: 常用a spot of bother表示小麻烦
常用于口语中表示打扰某人
英式英语中常用，美式英语用apartment
正式用词，指严厉地批评或责备
指由于不注意而造成的错误或疏忽
形容做事深思熟虑、小心谨慎
指在困难情况下保持冷静的能力
指隐藏在暗处等待时机
指手指留下的纹路，用于身份识别

meanings.meaning: 难以置信的；不可思议的
meanings.usage: 指某事令人难以想象或相信
原指喜鹊，因其收集习惯比喻爱收集东西的人
指储藏钱或物品以备将来使用
指为寻找东西而翻遍某处
珠宝的总称，不可数名词
指打断某人的活动或使某人担忧
形容人对小事过分担心或挑剔

phrases.usage: 表示小麻烦、小纠纷，是英语中常用的委婉表达

examples.en: She described it as a little spot of bother.
examples.zh: 她把这描述为一点小麻烦。

phrases.usage: 指通过武力或强行手段进入某处

examples.en: Burglars had forced an entry during her absence.
examples.zh: 窃贼趁她不在时强行闯入了。

phrases.usage: 表示在某人这个年纪，常用于表达某种行为是否适合某人的年龄

examples.en: At her age, it might be more prudent to have someone with her.
examples.zh: 在她这个年纪，有人陪着可能更明智。

phrases.usage: 指把东西翻过来或翻遍

examples.en: Everything she possessed had been tossed out and turned over.
examples.zh: 她的所有东西都被扔了出来，翻了个遍。

examples.en: She regained her composure and was ready to search.
examples.zh: 她恢复了镇定，准备开始搜查。

phrases.usage: 表示不是第一次做某事，暗示之前有过类似经历

examples.en: Their entry into this flat was apparently not the burglars' first job that day.
examples.zh: 他们进入这间公寓显然不是当天第一次作案。

phrases.usage: 指打电话，是口语中常见的表达

examples.en: She rang up her daughter and asked for help.
examples.zh: 她给女儿打电话请求帮助。

examples.en: The old lady was glad to be back at the block of flats.
examples.zh: 老太太很高兴回到她住的公寓。

examples.en: Her basket had grown heavier with every step.
examples.zh: 她的篮子每走一步就重一些。

phrases.usage: 比喻某事非常清楚、显而易见

examples.en: It was as clear as daylight that burglars had forced an entry.
examples.zh: 显而易见，窃贼强行闯入了。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，常用于描述过去的背景或先发生的事件
grammar.usage: 当需要表达'过去的过去'这一概念时使用，常与when, after, before等连用，或用于宾语从句中

examples.en: She had gone shopping after the home help had left.
examples.zh: 她在管家离开后才去购物。

examples.en: She had shut them before going out.
examples.zh: 她在出门前把门都关上了。

examples.en: The burglars must have been disturbed.

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻正在进行的动作，或用来描述过去的背景
grammar.usage: 常用于描述故事发生的背景，或与when/while等连用表示两个同时进行的动作

examples.en: Her thoughts were on lunch and a good rest.
examples.zh: 她满脑子想的都是午餐和好好休息。

examples.en: She was thinking that she must reprimand her home help.
examples.zh: 她正想着第二天早上一定要责备她的管家。

grammar.title: must have + 过去分词
grammar.definition: 表示对过去发生的事情的推测，意为'一定/肯定做过某事'
grammar.usage: 用于根据现有证据或情况对过去事件进行肯定性的推测

examples.en: She must reprimand her home help.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be glad to + 动词原形

original.en: The old lady was glad to be back at the block of flats.
original.zh: 老太太很高兴回到她住的公寓。

imitations.en: I was glad to see my old friends again.
imitations.zh: 我很高兴再次见到我的老朋友们。

imitations.en: She was glad to finish her work on time.
imitations.zh: 她很高兴按时完成了工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be/feel + 形容词 + to + 动词原形

original.en: At her age it might be more prudent to have someone with her.
original.zh: 在她这个年纪，有人陪着可能更明智。

imitations.en: It might be better to wait for the police.
It is wise to check everything carefully.
imitations.zh: 仔细检查一切是明智的。

original.en: It was as clear as daylight that burglars had forced an entry.
original.zh: 显而易见，窃贼强行闯入了。

imitations.en: It is obvious that she has been robbed.
It is certain that he will come tomorrow.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had + 过去分词 + before + doing something

original.en: She had shut them before going out.
original.zh: 她在出门前把门都关上了。

imitations.en: He had finished his homework before watching TV.
imitations.zh: 他在看电视前已经完成了作业。

imitations.en: I had locked the door before leaving.
imitations.zh: 我离开前已经锁好了门。
